item.title: Honkai: Star Rail version 4.1 update ‘Unraveled for Daybreak’ launches March 25
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Smartphone

Unveil the dark secrets lurking within the Phantasmoon Games.

The version 4.1 update for Honkai: Star Rail, dubbed “Unraveled for Daybreak,” will launch on March 25, developer miHoYo announced.

Here is an overview of the update, via miHoYo:

This update will continue to revolve around the story of Planarcadia, as the Astral Express Crew is invited to attend the grand “Star Rail FEST,” experiencing a fan festival inspired by their past interstellar journeys! However, beneath the revelry, conspiracies abound, and various crises will soon follow. Get ready to embark on this new adventure with the famous detective Ashveil!

After arriving at Planarcadia, the Trailblazer successfully obtained the mask of the supplicant to participate in the Phantasmoon Games and defeated the hottest local streamer Sparxie, becoming the top-tier trending of Planarcadia. Currently, in order to carry forward the spirit of Trailblazing, and give the people of Planarcadia a chance to keep up with Star Rail, Pearl, the CEO of Planarcadia, has decided to collaborate with the members of the Astral Express to hold a grand exposition called Star Rail FEST, themed around the adventurous journey of the Astral Express. With the much-anticipated Star Rail FEST about to commence, in the background the Phantasmoon Games are unfolding with unstoppable momentum, as the War of the Supplicants is on the verge of eruption—what direction will the story take next?

As a large-scale celebration honoring the legendary experiences of the Astral Express, Star Rail FEST will feature three major open zones: the Belobog Zone, Xianzhou Luofu Zone, and Penacony Zone. Citizens of Planarcadia can board a special Pom-Pom front shuttle express through Interplanar Jump to enjoy the highlights of their trailblaze journey. Here, you can witness giant balloon figures modeled after Supreme Guardian Cocolia and the Destruction Engine in battle, immerse yourself in the heart-pounding duel against the Lord Ravager Phantylia at Scalegorge Waterscape, and charge headlong at The Great Septimus under the tune of Robin’s singing. On the other hand, as the organizer of this FEST, the headquarters of Pearluxe Corp—Pearluxe Tower—will also be one of the latest areas to be unlocked for exploration. Inside the tower, not only will a newly ultra-poseable model, “Alloy King Pom-Pom,” be on display, but also a variety of mechatron-themed interactive activities that attendees won’t want to miss!

  • ❮
  • ❯

As a key figure in the latest stage, Ashveil will officially become a playable character. This “detective unreliable,” who typically presents a lazy and relaxed image, will truly showcase his serious and dependable side at this time. At the end of the last story stage, Ashveil entered the Phantasmoon Games and began investigating the murder case that occurred in the Dovebrook District. This time, Ashveil will continue to work alongside the Astral Express Crew to uncover the conspiracy hidden beneath the surface of the elation feast, in order to deliver justice for the fallen.

As a 5-star Lightning-Type character on the Path of The Hunt who will be available throughout the entire Version 4.1 Warp, Ashveil revels in the thrill of the hunt in combat. When he uses his Technique during Map Exploration, it can inflict a Stunned state on enemies within a certain range. After entering combat, Ashveil increases the CRIT DMG of all allies and selects one enemy to become the “Bait.” As long as the “Bait” is on the field, the DEF of all enemies will be reduced. When Ashveil uses his Skill on the “Bait” again, he will deal extra DMG and recover Skill Points for the team. Centering on the “Bait” target, Ashveil will launch a continuous Hounding Pursuit. When a teammate attacks the “Bait,” Ashveil unleashes a Follow-Up ATK and gradually accumulates “Gluttony” in combat. He can consume “Gluttony” to further enhance this unit’s Follow-Up ATK capabilities. Aside from launching consecutive Follow-Up ATKs against the target, after securing a kill, he will continue to deal DMG to the next enemy, much like a wolf pack driven by Hunger, he will never stop being On the Heels of his prey before crushing all their throats.

On the other hand, the new version is set to launch with an entirely new activity: the Wispae War Saga. The Trailblazer can lead various types of wispae soldiers to battle in the Graphia Academy. By employing different strategies, upgrading wispae, and using spell cards and capsules with different effects, the Trailblazer can defeat powerful champions within the academy and unlock new wispae companions. In addition to the rewards available for completing challenges, after finishing challenges within the Graphia Academy, the Trailblazer can engage in more challenging matches against outsider adversaries, gaining a diverse experience in gameplay and progression.

In addition to the many features mentioned above, there are even more exciting elements to look forward to in version 4.1. First, players can receive 10 wraps simply by logging in after the version launches. After the update, the Divergent Universe will enter the new Arcadian Chronicles phase. The Trailblazer will be able to freely choose areas to explore using “Waypoint Pass” cards representing different regions, along with a newly added upgradeable system—“A Mask of Elation” to unlock more rewards. Furthermore, the double-reward events Planar Fissure and Garden of Plenty will also be available in this version, helping players obtain more Planar Ornaments and Upgrade Materials.

Honkai: Star Rail is available now for PlayStation 5, PC via client download and Epic Games Store, iOS via App Store, and Android via Google Play.

Watch a new trailer and special program below. View a new set of screenshots at the gallery.

Version 4.1 Update “Unraveled for Daybreak” Trailer

English

Japanese

Korean

Traditional Chinese

Version 4.1 Update “Unraveled for Daybreak” Special Program

English

Japanese

Korean

Traditional Chinese



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/honkai-star-rail-version-4-1-update-unraveled-for-daybreak-launches-march-25
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Wuthering Waves version 3.2 update ‘Resolution to Illuminate the Shadows’ launches March 19
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Smartphone

Sigrika joins the fray.

Kuro Games will release the version 3.2 update for free-to-play open-world action RPG Wuthering Waves, dubbed “Resolution to Illuminate the Shadows,” on March 19, the developer announced.

Here is an overview of the update:

Version 3.2 Overview

  • New Main Quests
    • Chapter III Act IV Gold Suspended in Shadows
    • Segue: Afterstory Rabbit Reflected in Shades
  • New Expedition Motorbike Liveries
    • QUEEN and VIOLET – From April 9, 2026 at 10:00 to April 29, 2026 at 11:59 (server time), the following Expedition Motorbike Collab Livery bundles (Persona 5 Royal) will be available in the Store: QUEEN and VIOLET.
  • New High Difficulty Recurring Challenge
    • Endstate Matrix – Endstate Matrix is updated in the form of Challenge Cycles. Each Challenge Cycle contains multiple Challenge Stages. The first Challenge Cycle (Endstate Matrix: Doomsday Cycle) lasts from Version 3.2 to Version 3.4. For more details, stay tuned for upcoming official announcements.
  • New Tactical Hologram Challenge
    • Tactical Hologram: Hyvatia
  • Optimizations
    • Gaming Experience
      • In the Resonator trial event “Ascendant Aces,” you can now directly claim the rewards for Resonators whose trials you’ve completed in a previous version upon re-entering the event, without having to repeat the challenges.
    • Expedition Motorbike Experience
      • Optimized the Expedition Motorbike’s Autopilot Mode: Adjusted the obstacle-avoidance logic to reduce sudden tur  caused by overly sensitive detection while driving.
      • Optimized Expedition Motorbike’s chassis adaptability: This reduces instances of getting stuck on small bumps or uneve terrain, allowing for smoother travel overall.
    • Echo Upgrade & Management
      • Adjusted the underlying logic of Echo management: Plans can now be edited based on Sonata Effect instead of freely assigning empty plans. You can batch-process your Echoes once you’ve finalized an optimized Echo management plan. Added the feature allowing the sharing and importing of Echo management plans: You can generate a plan code to share it with others or enter another Rover’s plan code to quickly import and apply their full plan configuration.
      • Added Smart Discard: You can discard Echoes according to Suggested Plan or Custom Management Plan. Based on the selected method, Echo Smart Discard can quickly filter and discard owned Echoes.
      • Optimized Echo Backpack: When the total number of stored Echoes exceeds a certain threshold, you will be reminded to use Smart Discard, and when the total number of discarded Echoes exceeds a certain threshold, you will be reminded to use Data Merge.
    • Graphics and Performance
      • Added the “High Quality” option for some mobile devices with relatively high performance.
      • Added the adjustable “Render Distance” option on PC. You can customize this setting based on your hardware and personal preferences.
  • New Resonator
    • Sigrika
  • Upcoming Featured Resonator Convene
    • Phase I
      • When the Runes Glitter
      • Wanderer Knows No Far and Near
    • Phase II
      • Undefined Spectrum
      • Between Light and Shadow
      • With Hushed Whispers
  • New Weapon
    • Solsworn Ciphers
  • Upcoming Featured Weapon Convene
    • Phase I
      • Solsworn Ciphers
      • Emerald Sentence
    • Phase II
      • Spectrum Blaster
      • Blazing Justice
      • Luminous Hymn
  • Special Events
    • Soar to the Beat – Rhythm Challenge Event
    • Gifts of Solsworn – Seven-Day Login Event
    • Knights of the Wild – Featured Challenge Event
    • Lahai-Roi Blocks – Leisure Event
    • Speed up! F.U.E.L. Instrumentality Project! – Leisure Event
    • The Flaming Red in Memory – Showcase Event
    • Whispers Between Stars – Permanent Event
  • Merchandise
    • Fleurdelys Cartethyia Collector’s Edition Statue – Prototype Reveal
    • Cartethyia 1/6 Scale Figure – Prototype Reveal
    • The Shorekeeper Nendoroid – Coming Soon

Wuthering Waves is available now for PlayStation 5, PC via client download, Steam, and Epic Games Store, iOS via App Store, and Android via Google Play.

Watch a new set of trailers below.

Version 3.2 Trailer

English

Japanese

Korean

Version 3.2 Special Broadcast

English

Japanese

Korean
